title: Baron Mordo/Earth-838
content:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Baron Mordo {{!}} Earth-838}} {{CharHub|Baron Mordo|Karl Mordo}} {{AltUniverse|[[Earth-838]]|3=Characters}} {{Character |name = Baron Mordo |image = Baron Mordo - Earth-838 Infobox.jpg |real name = Karl {{Conjecture|Amadeus}} Mordo{{Ref|DSitMoM}}{{Ref|Conjec}} |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Baron Mordo{{Ref|DSitMoM}}}} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|GRBR}}
{{Citizenship|ENG}} |gender = Male |title = {{WPS|Baron}}
[[:Category:Sorcerer Supreme|Sorcerer Supreme]] |affiliation = [[Masters of the Mystic Arts/Earth-838|Masters of the Mystic Arts]]
{{Affiliation|ILL}} |movie = ''[[Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness]]'' |actor = [[Chiwetel Ejiofor]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|It is not [[Wanda Maximoff]] who threatens our reality. It's the [[America Chavez|two]] of you. I only acted, as [[Supreme Strange|you]] would.|Baron Mordo to [[Doctor Strange]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} Baron '''Karl {{Conjecture|Amadeus}} Mordo''' is the [[:Category:Sorcerer Supreme|Sorcerer Supreme]] of the [[Masters of the Mystic Arts/Earth-838|Masters of the Mystic Arts]] and a member of the [[Illuminati]], succeeding the role of his late friend [[Supreme Strange]]. During [[Scarlet Witch]]'s [[Scarlet Witch's Multiversal Madness|war]], he met and imprisoned an alternate [[Doctor Strange]] and [[America Chavez]] at the [[Illuminati Headquarters]], fearing the former was as dangerous as Supreme Strange was. While judging Strange in a trial with his teammates, Scarlet Witch attacked and [[Battle at the Illuminati Headquarters|massacred]] the Illuminati, leaving Mordo as the sole survivor, who failed to stop Strange from escaping his custody. ==Biography== {{MD|Karl Mordo (Earth-838)}} ===Early Life=== ====Friendship with Supreme Strange==== {{Quote|You know nothing of this [[Earth-838|universe]]!"
"I know that killing [[Supreme Strange|Stephen Strange]] was your ticket to getting the [[New York Sanctum|Sanctum]], to becoming [[:Category:Sorcerer Supreme|Sorcerer Supreme]], and to joining your little circus of clowns, the [[Illuminati]]!|Baron Mordo and [[Doctor Strange]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} Hailing from [[England]] in the [[United Kingdom]], Baron Karl Amadeus Mordo trained in [[Magic|sorcery]] and eventually became part of the [[Masters of the Mystic Arts/Earth-838|Masters of the Mystic Arts]], led by the [[:Category:Sorcerer Supreme|Sorcerer Supreme]], [[Supreme Strange]]. He and Strange came to know one another as great friends, to the point Mordo would refer to him as a brother. During the [[Infinity War/Earth-838|Infinity War]] in [[2010s/Earth-838|2018]], Strange got corrupted by the [[Darkhold]] and accidentally caused an [[Incursion]] in another reality. As consequences, he was [[Execution of Doctor Strange|executed]] by his teammates, the [[Illuminati]]. Mordo then assumed his late friend's occupation as both Sorcerer Supreme and Illuminati member, and also helped spread a lie to the world that Strange died defeating [[Thanos/Earth-838|Thanos]], building an honorary statue of the hero in front of the [[New York Sanctum]].{{Ref|DSitMoM}} ===Illuminati Attacked=== ====Capturing Multiversal Travelers==== {{Quote|I always suspected this day would come."
"You did?"
"Yes. It was [[Supreme Strange|you]] who always suspected this day would come. My brother.|Baron Mordo and [[Doctor Strange]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} [[File:Mordo (Earth-838).jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Mordo greets [[Doctor Strange]] from Earth-616]] One day in [[2024/Earth-838|November 2024]], Mordo was exiting the [[New York Sanctum]] when he encountered [[Doctor Strange]] from Earth 616 and [[America Chavez]], who had traveled across the [[Multiverse]]. He warmly greeted Strange, much to the latter's dismay, and affectionately referred to him as a brother. Mordo proclaimed that he had been awaiting the day that an alternate version of [[Supreme Strange]] would cross over into his [[Earth-838|universe]], and invited both Chavez and Strange inside the sanctum, where they discussed the current problem at hand concerning [[Scarlet Witch]]. Mordo revealed that his reality also had the [[Darkhold]], and explained the concept of [[Dreamwalking]] and how Maximoff could use such a spell to her advantage. Strange then inquired about the [[Book of Vishanti]], which Mordo also confirmed he had access to. [[File:Mordo (Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness).jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Mordo has drugged [[Doctor Strange]] and [[America Chavez]]]] Unknown to Strange and Chavez, Mordo had served them tea laced with sedative drugs from the [[Sands of Nisanti]], which they began to feel the effects of. As the two started to lose consciousness, Mordo asserted that he was merely doing what Supreme Strange would have done in the same situation. [[File:Reed Richards, Maria Rambeau & Karl Mordo.png|{{AltFloat}}|Mordo and the [[Illuminati]] judge [[Doctor Strange]]]] He brought Chavez and Strange to [[Christine Palmer/Earth-838|Christine Palmer]] for analysis at the [[Illuminati Headquarters]], and later presented Strange to the [[Illuminati]], where they revealed the truth behind Supreme Strange's death. Strange's fate was to be put to a vote. However, before the team could proceed further, Maximoff attacked the headquarters, and Mordo as well as [[Professor X/Earth-838|Professor X]] were the only members who stayed behind to deal with Strange. Professor X then revealed his optimism concerning Strange's capacity for good; however, Mordo insisted that he could not be trusted.{{Ref|DSitMoM}} ====Massacre of the Illuminati==== [[File:DSMoM Trailer (4).png|{{AltFloat}}|Mordo prepares to fight [[Doctor Strange]]]] {{Quote|[[Illuminati|They]]'re not coming back. And you just cast your vote now to kill your friends. Not that that ever bothered you before.|[[Doctor Strange]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} [[Professor X/Earth-838|Professor X]] proceeded to leave [[Doctor Strange]] and Mordo alone with one another so that he could join the [[Illuminati]] in the fight against [[Scarlet Witch]]. Strange pleaded with the Baron to set him free and take him to the [[Book of Vishanti]] so that they could fight Scarlet Witch together, but the latter refused, stating that he would not take action until his team members returned so that he could cast the final vote. When they both heard the aftermath of the Illuminati's massacre, Strange asserted that Mordo's team members did not survive Scarlet Witch's attack, and proceeded to antagonize him, accusing the latter of being jealous of Supreme Strange and even being responsible for framing him for his usage of the [[Darkhold]]. Mordo angrily shouted that Strange knew nothing of his universe before stating that he was ready to cast his vote. [[File:Mordo vs Strange (Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness) (3).jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Mordo fights against [[Doctor Strange]]]] With this, Mordo drew his sword from his back and proceeded to attack Strange. The two engaged in a fight, where Strange wound up handcuffing Mordo to himself before dangling the both of them over a ledge in the council room, which eventually caused the handcuffs to snap in half, allowing Strange to escape after another brief struggle. Due to him staying behind to guard Strange, Baron Mordo was the only member of the Illuminati to have survived Scarlet Witch's assault on their [[Illuminati Headquarters|headquarters]].{{Ref|DSitMoM}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Quote|I, Baron Karl Mordo, the Sorcerer Supreme.|Karl Mordo|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} *'''[[Magic]]''': As the Sorcerer Supreme and master of the [[New York Sanctum]], Mordo is known to be one of the most powerful and skilled members of the [[Masters of the Mystic Arts/Earth-838|Masters of the Mystic Arts]], possessing a considerable mastery of the mystic arts and magical power which he used to defend his native reality. ===Abilities=== *'''Master Martial Artist''': [[File:Mordo and Strange.png|thumb|250px|Mordo fighting against [[Doctor Strange]]]] ''To be added'' *'''Sword Mastery''': Mordo is a highly skilled and formidable swordsman. He attempted to kill [[Doctor Strange]] through his sword mastery, but Strange outsmarted him by making Mordo cut off his handcuffs, allowing Strange to escape Mordo. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''[[Magic]] Sword''': Mordo used a magic sword during his fight with Strange in the Illuminati Headquarters. It was retracted once Strange handcuffed him. ===Other Equipment=== *'''[[Vaulting Boots of Valtorr]]''': Mordo utilized the Vaulting Boots of Valtorr during his fight with Strange inside the Illuminati Headquarters. ==Facilities== *'''[[New York Sanctum]]''': Following the [[Execution of Doctor Strange|execution]] of [[Doctor Strange/Earth-838|Doctor Strange]], Mordo succeeded him as Master of the New York Sanctum. *'''[[Illuminati Headquarters]]''': As a member of the [[Illuminati]], Mordo would occasionally reside at their facility in [[Central Park]], and would be present whenever the Illuminati had a meeting. During their discussion over an alternate [[Doctor Strange]]'s fate, he would be present and proceed to duel Strange upon [[Scarlet Witch]]'s attack on the facility. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}} {{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[Masters of the Mystic Arts/Earth-838|Masters of the Mystic Arts]] **[[Supreme Strange|Stephen Strange/Supreme Strange]] † - Friend, Leader and Predecessor *[[Illuminati]] - Teammates **[[Professor X/Earth-838|Charles Xavier/Professor X]] † **[[Mister Fantastic/Earth-838|Reed Richards/Mister Fantastic]] † **[[Captain Marvel/Earth-838|Maria Rambeau/Captain Marvel]] † **[[Captain Carter/Earth-838|Peggy Carter/Captain Carter]] † **[[Black Bolt/Earth-838|Blackagar Boltagon/Black Bolt]] † *[[Ultron Sentries]] *[[Christine Palmer/Earth-838|Christine Palmer]] *[[Fantastic Four/Earth-838|Fantastic Four]] *[[Inhuman Royal Family/Earth-838|Inhuman Royal Family]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Thanos/Earth-838|Thanos]] † *[[Doctor Strange|Stephen Strange/Doctor Strange]] - Former Prisoner and Attempted Victim *[[America Chavez]] - Former Prisoner *[[Scarlet Witch|Wanda Maximoff/Scarlet Witch]] † {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *The design of the staff in which Baron Mordo conceals his magic sword was based off of a model of the [[Staff of the Living Tribunal]] from ''[[Doctor Strange (film)|Doctor Strange]]''.{{Ref|TAoDSitMoM}} ==References== {{Gallery|Baron Mordo/Earth-838/Gallery}} {{Wq}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel|Baron Mordo}} *{{WP|Baron Mordo}} *{{Marvel.com|characters/baron-mordo-karl-mordo|Baron Mordo}} [[es:Karl Mordo/Illuminati Unidos]] [[ru:Карл Мордо/Иллюминаты]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Sorcerers]] [[Category:Sorcerer Supreme]] [[Category:Masters of the Mystic Arts Members/Earth-838]] [[Category:Illuminati Members]]
